title: cuphea retroscabra
intro: Cuphea retroscabra, also known as the firecracker plant, is a tropical perennial plant native to Central and South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cuphea retroscabra include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal remedies and traditional medicine preparations.
